Code Review

Subpage of Agentic Coding

Agents, feedback loops, and implementation habits.

Code review is one way to monitor code and flag out issues that arise with the code. It is possible to set up an agent to do code review yourself however there are a bunch of platforms that do sophisticated code review for you.

Below are a few code review platforms to check out:

  • Code Rabbit
  • Greptile
  • Gitlab Duo
  • Codex review
  • Devin review
  • Cubic
